# F. Aamir Ali

> F. Aamir Ali is a student builder and founder from Surrey, British Columbia. He built and deployed an AI assistant inside his 1,500-student high school — recognized by the school's principal as the first student-built system of its kind there — and founded the Surrey Youth AI Summit, which brought ~70 students from 14 schools together to build AI in a single day. He also founded and leads his school's AI & Innovation Club.

## Pages
- [About](https://faamirali.com/about): Full background — what he builds and how he works.
- [FleetBot](https://faamirali.com/work/fleetbot): An AI assistant deployed inside a 1,500-student school — the build, the deployment, and an honest account of adoption.
- [Surrey Youth AI Summit](https://faamirali.com/work/surrey-ai-summit): A one-day youth AI competition — ~70 students, 14 schools, a real sponsor, and a UBC keynote.
- [AI & Innovation Club](https://faamirali.com/work/ai-club): The club he founded to teach students to build with AI.
